data.title: [RED] tests/scripts/test-ticket-subprocess-count.sh: verify list and show invoke ≤1 python3 for pipeline
data.description: Create tests/scripts/test-ticket-subprocess-count.sh. Structural RED test: grep plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-list.sh for 'python3' occurrences in the LLM format branch — assert count is ≤1 after consolidation (currently 2: one for reducer, one for importlib dance). Same for ticket-show.sh. Test MUST fail before S2-T4 implementation. Also verify ticket-transition.sh: the main pipeline (flock section, lines ~222-352) invokes exactly 1 python3. Use grep + awk line-count approach, not subprocess interception. testing_mode: RED.
